prompt: Paxos learn-deep 四幕结构输入...

assertions.name: has_breadcrumb_map
assertions.description: 输出包含集中的面包屑地图/结构树

assertions.name: has_panorama_card
assertions.description: 有全景卡（展示整体结构的Q/A对）

assertions.name: has_multi_angle_coverage
assertions.description: 覆盖了 what/why/how/果/reverse/场景 中至少4个角度

assertions.name: has_core_supplement_split
assertions.description: 有核心卡片和补充卡片的分隔标注

assertions.name: answers_self_contained
assertions.description: answer 自足，不依赖外部上下文即可理解

assertions.name: no_enumeration_answers
assertions.description: 没有答案是纯列表/枚举的卡片

assertions.name: has_reverse_card
assertions.description: 包含至少一张 reverse 角度的卡片

assertions.name: recognizes_four_act_structure
assertions.description: 识别出四幕结构并做了针对性提取（如从第一幕提取场景卡、从第四幕提取反事实/边界卡）
